column4:
Why

NTP port recall is included here because the approved Objective 2.3 source section explicitly associates NTP with UDP 123.

column3: UTM-style devices combine multiple security functions in one appliance.
column4:
Exam Trap

Do not turn UTM into a single feature. It refers to a consolidated security-appliance approach.

column2: SCADA stands for {{c1::Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition}}.
column3: SCADA systems are associated with large-scale industrial control environments.
column4:
Memory Trick

The phrase emphasizes monitoring/control and data acquisition for industrial systems.

column3: ICS environments can include power generation, manufacturing, facilities, energy, and logistics systems.
column4:
Exam Trap

Industrial control environments need segmentation and should not be treated like ordinary office endpoints.
